title: Nutty Light Dutch Graham Cracker Crumble
description: This adventurous Dutch dish features a light and crunchy graham cracker base infused with the warmth of bhuna masala spices for an unusual yet delightful flavor profile, perfect for a savory or sweet snack.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup nutritional yeast flakes
ingredients.notes: for a cheesy texture and flavor

ingredients.name: 3/4 cup unsalted cashews, soaked overnight and drained

instructions: Combine graham crackers, bhuna masala spice mix, nutritional yeast, and soaked cashews in a mixing bowl.
Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed and the mixture is cohesive.
Transfer the mixture into an ungreased baking dish or molds of your choice. Press it down firmly to form uniform layers.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden and crisp on top.
Allow to cool slightly before slicing and serving.
